---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a reusable improvement for the repository or skill system
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed addition or change.

## Problem

What reusable problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the preferred solution.

## Scope Check

Explain why this belongs in `infocard-video-skills` and not:

- the upstream `remotion-best-practices` skill
- a one-off example project
- another repository

## Expected Outcome

What should the repository gain if this is accepted?

## Notes

Add links, examples, or prior discussion if useful.
